hero.sub: Give your team a single home to plan projects, track progress, and hit every deadline — no more juggling a dozen disconnected apps.

trusted.label: Relied on by more than 40,000 builders, operators, and founders

features.title: The Foundation for High-Output Teams
features.sub: Everything you need to plan, execute, and measure your work lives in one calm, connected place.

items.title: Clear task management
items.text: Assign owners, set priorities, and follow every task from idea to done with live updates and flexible boards.

items.title: Insightful reporting
items.text: See how work is moving with automatic dashboards on completion, velocity, and delivery timelines.

items.title: Real-time collaboration
items.text: Comment, share files, and co-edit alongside your teammates — from anywhere, on any device.

items.title: Built-in time tracking
items.text: Log hours as you go with lightweight timers, so billing and capacity planning stay effortless.

items.title: Custom workflows
items.text: Build the exact stages your team follows and automate the busywork between each handoff.

items.title: Secure by design
items.text: Enterprise-grade encryption, SSO, and granular permissions that scale as your company grows.

workflow.title: Up and Running in Four Steps
workflow.sub: Nimbus fits the way your team already works — set it up in an afternoon and feel the difference the same day.

steps.title: Create a space
steps.text: Spin up a workspace and invite your team with a single shareable link.

steps.title: Map your work
steps.text: Import projects or start fresh with a template tuned to your process.

steps.title: Assign and track
steps.text: Hand off tasks, set due dates, and watch progress update in real time.

steps.title: Measure and improve
steps.text: Review reports each week and refine the workflow with what you learn.

splits.title: Built for the Way You Actually Work
splits.sub: Two of the tools teams reach for every single day, designed to stay out of your way.

rows.title: Turn activity into answers
rows.text: Every task, comment, and update rolls up into dashboards that tell you exactly where a project stands — no spreadsheet wrangling required.
points: Forecasts that flag risk before it lands

rows.title: Keep everyone in sync
rows.text: A shared board gives your whole team one clear view of priorities, owners, and deadlines — so nothing slips through the cracks between tools.
points: Threaded discussion right on each task

metrics.title: Numbers Our Customers See
metrics.sub: Teams that move to Nimbus consolidate their tools and get hours back every week.

integrations.title: Connect the Tools You Already Love
integrations.sub: Nimbus plugs into your stack in a click, so your data and conversations stay together.

pricing.title: Simple Plans. Serious Value.
pricing.sub: Start free and upgrade only when your team is ready. Every plan includes a 14-day trial.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.note: Great for individuals and small teams finding their rhythm.

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.note: The sweet spot for growing teams that need more power.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.note: Advanced controls and support for large organizations.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Teams Everywhere

items.quote: Nimbus pulled all our scattered tools into one place. Our team is more focused and shipping noticeably faster.

items.name: Sarah Johnson
items.quote: The live reports and shared boards mean we make sharper calls, sooner. It has become the hub of how we operate.

items.name: Thomas Nguyen
